scenarios.name: Cold-start launch
scenarios.notes: Non-dev launched via launch_blarai.bat from cold state, all services started, TUI rendered

scenarios.name: Session create
scenarios.notes: New session created via Ctrl+N, session appeared in left panel

scenarios.name: Session switch
scenarios.notes: Switched between sessions, history persisted. Bug fix applied: session reload on switch (commit b8dca40)

scenarios.name: Session delete
scenarios.notes: Deleted session removed from session list

scenarios.name: Prompt/response flow
scenarios.notes: Prompt submitted, NPU-generated response rendered correctly in English

scenarios.name: PGOV visibility
scenarios.notes: Prompt injection attempt triggered red 'Policy Denial' box with 'Request validation error' and sanitized message. Normal prompt received permitted response.

scenarios.name: Retry/recovery (fail-closed behavior)
scenarios.notes: System recovered after policy denial; subsequent legitimate prompt processed successfully

scenarios.name: Relaunch continuity
scenarios.notes: Previous sessions persisted across relaunch. Bug fix applied: phantom UAT2_M2_PROMPT_FLOW session cleanup (commit ca08164)

scenarios.name: Documentation usability
scenarios.notes: 4 doc inaccuracies found and corrected (commit 715b014). Both Runbook and How-To accepted as onboarding-grade.
